$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026. 10th canonical instance of D12 cycle JSON sub-shape (5th in S3). **Governance-only / lightweight-AAR sub-variant** — no target-file streamline; cycle output is the mission spec AAR + close cascade. 1st canonical instance of this micro-shape within D12; matches the equivalent governance-only cycle JSON shape used at M5.3 cycle 110 (D11 decadal AAR cycle; different in that D11 had full Reviewer Lens Pass vs D12 has lightweight 5-line AAR per Campaign SO #11 cadence).

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Cycle 120 = governance-only close cascade. NO target file streamline (per M5.0 §3 D12 row 'no full Reviewer Lens Pass; lightweight 5-line AAR'). Execute close cascade: (a) fill mission spec Mission Close Notes section with comprehensive close-state summary; (b) fill mission spec Lightweight AAR section with 5 lines per template_aar_lightweight.md shape (Worked / Didn't / Finding / Change / Follow-up); (c) flip mission spec status in_progress → completed + populate closed_at + closed_session + actual_sessions; (d) mark PCEL row 120 completed; (e) flip campaign master M5.4 row in_progress → completed + append amendments-table 2026-05-29 row 1; (f) refresh STATE.md Op 3 archive-on-close 34th canonical instance (demote M5.4 S2 PRIOR → demoted; demote M5.4 S1 OPEN further; promote M5.4 S3 + MISSION CLOSED to full-form top bullet; Next Session Prompt → M5.5 D14 entry); (g) move session file active → history/2026-05/; (h) push at G3 per D-PUSH 16-precedent chain.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A on the AAR + close cascade artifacts (5-line AAR + Mission Close Notes + governance cascade) — 3 personas vs 4 in numbered cycles because Newcomer Stress-Tester doesn't apply to governance-only AAR cycle (no user-facing surface change)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style (AAR voice = retrospective + audit; should be concise + auditable + name names) + Q2 Clarity (5 lines each must be self-contained; Worked + Didn't + Finding + Change + Follow-up cover the standard retrospective dimensions) + Q3 Conciseness (5-line AAR is the discipline; longer would be a full AAR — that cadence is reserved for D11/D14/D17/D20 per Campaign SO #11) + Q4 Bloat (Mission Close Notes section should be dense + auditable + comprehensive; the AAR section itself is bounded at 5 lines) + Q5 Comprehension (would a fresh agent reading this in 2026-07 understand what M5.4 delivered + what to carry into M5.5+? Yes — Mission Close Notes carry the cumulative-reduction tally + 9 sub-shapes + 4 graduations + 7 carry-seeds + 14 AC discharge + content-class taxonomy finding)

persona_consensus.anti_bloat_editor: 5-line AAR holds the 5-line discipline (no overflow into multi-paragraph reflections). Mission Close Notes is dense + auditable (numerical tally + named graduations + standing-order discharge map). The 'content-class taxonomy' finding in line 3 is the highest-leverage retrospective insight for M5.5+ planning. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.ux_writer: AAR voice is retrospective-imperative ('Worked' verb-first; 'Didn't' verb-first; 'Finding' noun-statement; 'Change' verb-first; 'Follow-up' verb-first). Each line is a single self-contained sentence cluster. Mission Close Notes uses dense-but-auditable register matching M5.3 D11 close precedent. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.information_architect: Close cascade preserves canonical M5.4 audit trail: mission spec carries close state + AAR + Mission Close Notes; campaign master carries amendments-table row; STATE.md carries Op 3 canonical instance; session file moves to history/2026-05/. Each governance surface carries exactly its scope of audit responsibility — no duplication; no missing pointer. Score 4.5/5.0.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 3/3 personas approve close cascade approach. Implementation: (a) fill Mission Close Notes with comprehensive auditable summary; (b) fill Lightweight AAR with 5-line discipline; (c) flip mission status + close fields; (d) cycle 120 PCEL row completed; (e) campaign master flip + amendments; (f) STATE.md Op 3 34th canonical; (g) session file move; (h) push at G3. Single binary commit per cycle discipline preserved (this cycle = governance close commit).

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — D12 text-only end-to-end; cycle 120 governance-only.

lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_rust_role_segregation: HONORED — lightweight AAR is the AAR; Mission Close Notes is the close-state summary; PCEL is the per-cycle audit trail; campaign master is the inter-mission coordination layer; STATE.md is the operational snapshot; each surface has a single role.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_astro_concept_before_syntax: HONORED — Mission Close Notes lede frames the close state (3 sessions; 10 cycles; cumulative reduction) before the substrate (9 sub-shapes + 4 graduations + 7 carry-seeds + 14 AC discharge).
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_tailwind_task_focused_imper: HONORED — AAR lines lead with verbs (Worked + Didn't + Finding + Change + Follow-up).
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_tauri_capability_organizati: HONORED — Mission Close Notes organized by reader-capability (what was delivered → what sub-shapes ratified → what graduated → what new seeds → what discharged → what to do at M5.5+).
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_stripe_page_bloat: AVOIDED — 5-line AAR is the bound; no overflow into multi-paragraph reflections.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_vercel_marketing_copy: AVOIDED — AAR voice is retrospective-imperative + auditable; no marketing adjectives.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_linear_categorical_hierarc: AVOIDED — Mission Close Notes ordered by audit-trail importance (close state → sub-shapes → graduations → seeds → AC discharge → carve-outs), not by source-category.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_obsidian_plugins_ia_fragme: AVOIDED — AAR + Close Notes + PCEL all live in single canonical mission spec file (mission_adna_str_p5_m54_d12_clarity_conciseness.md); no fragmentation.
lift_avoid_verification.standing_order_8_self_reference: HONORED — the close cascade itself IS a self-referential demonstration: the M5.4 mission spec records its own close; the campaign master records the M5.4 close; the STATE.md records the M5.4 close via Op 3 archive-on-close; the session file records the M5.4 close via active → history move. Same audit-trail discipline that aDNA teaches at the entity-type level.
